task: Search for the cheapest apartment in Detroit for a student.
final_result_response:
I searched for the cheapest apartment in Detroit for a student on Apartments.com (sorted by price ascending). Here are the results:

## 🏆 Cheapest Apartment in Detroit for a Student

### #1 — Alden Towers (CHEAPEST)
- **Address:** 8100-8106 E Jefferson Ave, Detroit, MI 48214 (Riverfront East neighborhood)
- **Starting Price:** $700/month (Studio, 300 sq ft — Unit 81B102, available now!)
- **Full Range:** $700 – $2,195/mo (Studio to 3 Bedrooms)
- **Bathrooms:** 1–3 Bathrooms | **Sq Ft:** 300–1,879 sq ft
- **Amenities:** Waterfront, Bay Window, Walk-in Closets, Balcony, Gated, Elevator, Grill, On-site Manager, Controlled Access
- **Rating:** ⭐ 3.6/5 (21 reviews)
- **Special Offer:** Move in by March 31st to win prizes (50" TV, Ring Camera, $500 Rent Credit!)
- **Link:** https://www.apartments.com/alden-towers-detroit-mi/pt6qj8s/

---

### Top 5 Cheapest Apartments in Detroit
| Rank | Name | Min Price | Address |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Alden Towers | $700/mo | 8100 E Jefferson Ave |
| 2 | The Hamilton Midtown Detroit | $830/mo | 40 Davenport St |
| 3 | Town Residences | $840/mo | 1511 1st St |
| 4 | GoodHomes Detroit | $875/mo | 5777 Southfield Fwy |
| 5 | City Place Detroit | $900/mo | 1600 Antietam Ave |

**Alden Towers** is the most affordable option at just **$700/month** for a studio — ideal for a student on a budget, with great amenities including waterfront views and a balcony.
